conflict: Legal counsel and donors treat Marisol as a liability and impose formal suspension terms.
consequence: Residency stipend is frozen, archive badge deactivated, and Ada is instructed to sever informal contact.
must_land_beats: Suspension meeting is procedural, cold, and one-sided.
Marisol is acted upon; she has no effective tactical move in-room.
Financial implications are itemized in writing.
Ada's professional risk is made explicit by HR.
objective: Keep the residency alive long enough to finish evidence gathering.
